nodes.norm_label: render the scl text artifact. raises until implemented (phase 3).

nodes.label: Fold one network into statements (or reconstructed SCL text).
nodes.norm_label: fold one network into statements (or reconstructed scl text).

nodes.label: Fold a network once, returning the logic and (for FlgNet) its folder so     fold
nodes.norm_label: fold a network once, returning the logic and (for flgnet) its folder so     fold

nodes.label: Folds a single FlgNet. Holds the pin-graph maps and the memoised eval.
nodes.norm_label: folds a single flgnet. holds the pin-graph maps and the memoised eval.

nodes.label: Turn the _POWER sentinel into a concrete TRUE; pass anything else through.
nodes.norm_label: turn the _power sentinel into a concrete true; pass anything else through.

nodes.label: AND-combine, dropping pure-power operands and flattening nested ANDs.
nodes.norm_label: and-combine, dropping pure-power operands and flattening nested ands.

nodes.label: OR the branches, factoring a shared leading AND-prefix out front.      ``(A AND
nodes.norm_label: or the branches, factoring a shared leading and-prefix out front.      ``(a and

nodes.label: Structural signature ignoring source UIds, for prefix comparison.
nodes.norm_label: structural signature ignoring source uids, for prefix comparison.

nodes.label: True if a VarRef with this name appears anywhere in the expression tree.
nodes.norm_label: true if a varref with this name appears anywhere in the expression tree.

nodes.label: Render an Instance (system FB backing member) as a display name.
nodes.norm_label: render an instance (system fb backing member) as a display name.

nodes.label: Order pins so in1 < in2 < ... < in10 (numeric suffix aware).
nodes.norm_label: order pins so in1 < in2 < ... < in10 (numeric suffix aware).

nodes.label: The instruction catalog — deliberately *data, not logic*.  fold.py reasons about
nodes.norm_label: the instruction catalog — deliberately *data, not logic*.  fold.py reasons about

nodes.norm_label: return the spec for a part name, or none (caller folds to ir.unhandled).

nodes.norm_label: phase 2 output: the folded *semantics*, with no memory of the xml.  a network be

nodes.label: A resolved operand, already rendered to its display form by operand.py.
nodes.norm_label: a resolved operand, already rendered to its display form by operand.py.

nodes.label: Free-form expression text taken verbatim (e.g. a Calculate-box Equation).
nodes.norm_label: free-form expression text taken verbatim (e.g. a calculate-box equation).

nodes.label: A construct parsed but not folded. Rendered loudly by emit, never dropped.
nodes.norm_label: a construct parsed but not folded. rendered loudly by emit, never dropped.

nodes.label: Rs / Sr — reset- or set-priority bistable on a stored operand.
nodes.norm_label: rs / sr — reset- or set-priority bistable on a stored operand.

nodes.norm_label: a system fb/fc box: ton/tof/tp, move/add/inc, rd_loc_t, ...

nodes.label: Phase 1 output: a faithful, behaviour-free mirror of the SimaticML XML.  This la

nodes.label: Per-compile-unit programming language. Subset we render in v0 + passthrough.
nodes.norm_label: per-compile-unit programming language. subset we render in v0 + passthrough.

nodes.norm_label: one level of a (possibly dotted) symbol path, e.g. system.clk100ms.

nodes.label: A data reference. Per-use (never deduplicated): each occurrence is its own node.
nodes.norm_label: a data reference. per-use (never deduplicated): each occurrence is its own node.
